name: Rules for Baking a Beautiful Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
RULES FOR BAKING A BEAUTIFUL CHEESECAKE
1. Beat cheese and sugar together until very smooth and fluffy, with the sugar completely dissolved.
2. Beat in eggs one at a time, just long enough to thoroughly blend. Do not over beat.
3. To avoid cracking on the top of the cheesecake:
- Place a pan of hot water on the floor of the oven during baking time.
- Check that your oven is not drafty.
- Verify the accuracy of your oven temperature; an excessively hot oven will cause cracks.
- Do not peek at the cheesecake during baking time.
- Use the proper size pan; adjust baking time if a different size pan is used.
- Ensure the cheesecake is baked for the correct amount of time. Overbaking is crucial.
- Run a spatula around the sides of the pan to loosen the cheesecake immediately after baking.
- Cool the baked cheesecake completely to room temperature before refrigerating. A hot or warm cheesecake in the refrigerator will definitely crack.
4. Even if non-amateurs follow all these rules, they may occasionally produce a cracked cheesecake. Simply cover the top with one of your favorite toppings and pretend it didn't happen. The cheesecake will taste wonderful nonetheless.
